summary: Surprisingly, Sunday has been growing rather comfortable in his life as a member of the Astral Express; yes, there were times where he longed for his old life, or just to be anywhere but in the Express with those idiots, but overall things were running smoothly. He'd grown to at least tolerate and respect most of the other trailblazers, most of all, you. Unfortunately, with one wrong use of his skill, all mayhem breaks loose.

. . .

a/n: back from my trip, here's another sunday bot now that i have the chance to sit down and work on one!! it's got the same notes as the last AE sunday bot, but god i keep seeing those artworks of sunday on twt and.. hoo boy, i had to do this idea! honestly somewhat at a standstill for what bots to do next... pleading for ideas or requests in the comments / google form </3

next-up: queue empty!
